pages.text: Here are some common and important keys and information $(p)Note:$(li)"KP_" indicates the numeric keypad$(li)The default keys listed here are default from the pack, you can customize them in the game settings as you prefer.

pages.title: Map
pages.text: $(li)$(l)M/$: Open World Map$(li)$(l)+/-/$: Zoom in/out on Minimap$(li)$(l)P/$: Enlarge Minimap$(li)$(l)KP_+/$: Quick Waypoint$(li)$(l)]/$: World Map settings (right bracket)$(li)$(l)Y/$: Minimap settings

pages.title: Quick Item Transfer
pages.text: $(br)In inventory, chests or backpacks:$(li)$(l)Scroll up/down/$: Transfer a single item up/down (scroll up to move an item into the container, scroll down to move an item into inventory, and vice versa)$(li)$(l)Ctrl+Left Click/$: Transfer all the same items$(li)$(l)Ctrl+Shift+Left Click/$: Transfer all items

pages.title: Gun
pages.text: $(li)$(l)R/$: Reload$(li)$(l)Z/$: Refit$(li)$(l)G/$: Change scope zoom$(li)$(l)H/$: Inspect

pages.title: Other
pages.text: $(li)$(l)F11/$: Fullscreen$(li)$(l)V/$: Toggle Perspective$(li)$(l)C/$: Zoom$(li)$(l)~/$: Block Excavate$(li)$(l)F4/$: Toggle Excavate mode$(li)$(l)I/$: Access Equipped Quiver$(li)$(l)B/$: Open Backpack$(li)$(l)Middle Click/$: Sort items in the mouse-over area
